name: Moon Transit 19th-24th Nakshatra (Two Feet) — Foreign Journey Day
description: When the fast-moving Moon transits the Nakshatras representing the two feet of the Kala Purusha (19th through 24th from the birth star), it acts as an exact daily trigger for departure.

source_text.quote: The Moons's transit Distribution amongst limbs Effects... (g) 19th, 20th, 21st. 22nd. 23rd. 24th - two feet going to foreign place

any_of: Transit Moon passes through the 19th Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Moon passes through the 20th Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Moon passes through the 21st Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Moon passes through the 22nd Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Moon passes through the 23rd Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Moon passes through the 24th Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: When the fast-moving Moon transits the specific group of Nakshatras representing the two feet of the Kala Purusha (19th through 24th from the birth star), it acts as an exact, short-term daily trigger for departure and journeying to a foreign place.

metadata.notes: An Anga Gochara (limb transit) rule used to pinpoint the exact day a physical journey or foreign travel is activated.

name: Mars Transit 26th-27th Nakshatra (Two Eyes) — Foreign Entry Trigger
description: When Mars transits the Nakshatras representing the two eyes of the Kala Purusha (26th and 27th from birth star), its dynamic energy triggers exact travel activation or physical entry into a foreign place.

source_text.quote: Mars' transit Distribution amongst limbs Effects... (h) 26th, 27th - two eyes going to a foreign place

any_of: Transit Mars passes through the 26th Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Mars passes through the 27th Nakshatra counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: When Mars transits the Nakshatras representing the two eyes of the Kala Purusha (26th and 27th from the birth star), its dynamic energy triggers exact travel activation or physical entry into a foreign place.

metadata.notes: Provides a slightly broader but still highly specific fast transit window (roughly 1.5 to 2 months) for foreign travel initiation and border crossings.

name: Moon/Mars on Adhana Tara (19th Star) — Exact Residence Shift Day
description: The exact transit of fast-moving planets (Moon or Mars) over the 19th Nakshatra (Adhana) from the birth star acts as an immediate trigger for physical geographical relocation.

source_text.quote: Adhana 19th Star... Triggers geographical relocation, career settlement, and creative output.

any_of: Transit Moon passes over the exact longitude of the 19th Nakshatra (Adhana Tara) counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra
Transit Mars passes over the exact longitude of the 19th Nakshatra (Adhana Tara) counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: The exact transit of fast-moving planets like the Moon or Mars over the 19th Nakshatra (Adhana) from the birth star acts as an immediate trigger for physical geographical relocation and establishing a new residence.

metadata.notes: A pinpoint timing technique used to identify the exact day of moving out or shifting residence belongings.

name: Mars on Desha Tara (27th Star) — Forced Departure Trigger
description: Mars transiting the exact degree of the 27th star from the Moon acts as a fast, sharp trigger for alienation from the local community and forces a sudden departure from the homeland.

source_text.quote: Desha 27th Star... Determines relationship to the homeland; malefic transits can alienate the native from their community.

all_of: Transit Mars passes over the exact longitude of the 27th Nakshatra (Desha Tara) counted from the natal Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: Mars transiting the exact degree of the 27th star from the Moon acts as a fast, sharp trigger for alienation from the local community and forces a sudden departure from the homeland.

metadata.notes: An exact transit trigger for forced moves, sudden migrations, or breaking ties with one's physical roots.
